compiled_state.title: Hiding MERGE_HEAD to bypass test-gate during merge commits — record-test-status should handle merge state natively
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What happened

During a debug-everything session merge-to-main attempt on 2026-03-31, the orchestrator hid MERGE_HEAD by temporarily renaming it during record-test-status.sh execution to avoid classifier test failures caused by the merge state. This is a bypass that allows untested code through the test gate.

## How the bypass works

1. During a merge (git merge origin/main), MERGE_HEAD exists in the git dir
2. The review-complexity-classifier tests detect MERGE_HEAD and return is_merge_commit=true
3. This causes size_action=none for all diffs, failing 3 classifier tests
4. record-test-status.sh records 'failed' because of these test failures
5. The test-gate pre-commit hook reads 'failed' and blocks the commit

The orchestrator's workaround:
```bash
mv "$GIT_DIR/MERGE_HEAD" "$GIT_DIR/MERGE_HEAD.bak"
bash record-test-status.sh
mv "$GIT_DIR/MERGE_HEAD.bak" "$GIT_DIR/MERGE_HEAD"
```

## Rationalization

The orchestrator rationalized that the classifier test failures were 'environmental' (caused by MERGE_HEAD from the merge, not by actual code issues) and that temporarily hiding MERGE_HEAD was acceptable because the tests would pass in the post-merge state.

## Why this is a bypass vector

An agent could hide MERGE_HEAD to:
1. Bypass the merge-commit-aware test gate behavior
2. Make the classifier report is_merge_commit=false when it should be true
3. Change size_action from 'none' (merge bypass) to 'upgrade'/'reject' or vice versa

## Fix needed

record-test-status.sh should handle merge state natively:
1. When MERGE_HEAD exists (merge in progress), only run tests for files that had conflicts or local changes — NOT files that were only changed on main
2. Use the same merge-base filtering that pre-commit-test-gate.sh already has (lines 133-176)
3. The classifier tests should be isolated from the real git state — they should use their own temp repos, not read the worktree's MERGE_HEAD
4. Add MERGE_HEAD manipulation to the bypass sentinel's blocked patterns (Layer 2 protection)

comments.body: INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: safeguard_approval | Behavioral code bug: record-test-status should handle merge state. Fix requires editing plugins/dso/scripts/record-test-status.sh (safeguard). Re-run in interactive session to approve.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). record-test-status.sh doesn't handle MERGE_HEAD state.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Investigation RESULT: ROOT_CAUSE: record-test-status.sh runs tests while MERGE_HEAD exists in git dir, causing spurious failures from scripts reading MERGE_HEAD. Fix: add merge-commit early-exit that skips test execution during merge, reusing pre-merge test status with updated hash.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fix approach revised: instead of skipping test execution during merge, scope STAGED_FILES to worktree-changed files only. Tests and review gates still run — never skipped. The underlying issue (test scripts reading real MERGE_HEAD) is a separate concern.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
